scope: Historical scanner evidence only; Scanner.tsx exact bytes are staged under a non-runtime destination filename and are not active source.

files.notes: Exact historical bytes stored under a non-runtime destination filename so TypeScript does not treat the evidence as a build input. Do not edit, rename into an active extension, import, adapt, compile, or activate this file in this operation.
Exact historical evidence only. Preserve byte-for-byte outside the active src tree; do not import this stylesheet or weaken style validation in this operation.
Historical dependency evidence only. Do not copy or merge it into scan3/package.json and do not install dependencies during evidence staging.

validation.officialRepositoryLocalNodeValidator: NOT_RUN in packet-creation environment; AI Studio must run scripts/validate-source-packet.cjs after download and extraction.

limitations: No dependency installation, source adaptation, runtime import, route activation, compiler configuration change, or Firebase connectivity is authorized.
